title: 宝塚記念の後に・導く者

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I am not some ordinary princess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"There she is! The savage Umamusume! She thinks
she's a princess?! She's just a savage!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Look here. The princess in this book is gentle
and calm. If you want to become a princess, you
need to be quiet and well-behaved."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm not the princess that you all imagine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"You aren't fit to enter a dignified and historic
race like the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. You never
were."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Everything you say, everything you do, it's
always about yourself. You're the worst princess
there is."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Some people may see me that way. But even still,
I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But you stayed true to your ideal of a princess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But you stayed true to your ideal of a princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I am me! And I'm proud of who I am! I'm going to
become my ideal princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That was super cool. I so felt your passion while we were runnin'.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Can I... challenge you again sometime?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe, of course! I look forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe, phew... My heart's pounding like crazy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's been one heated battle after another. Could
it already be time for the final episode?! Who will
the princess challenge next?!
choice_data_list: What do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: There can only be one race.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
So then, Kawakami Princess! You've got your
sights set on the Queen Elizabeth II Cup next!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Have you heard all the varied opinions about
you? Especially in regards to the Queen Elizabeth
II Cup...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, there are those who feel that I do not
conduct myself as a queen should.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: However, I don't believe that's a problem.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I, Kawakami Princess, will enter the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I have high expectations of the other princesses
I'll meet there—the Umamusume who strive to be
queen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
To all those who, like me, pursue their ideal
selves, I say this! Let's battle in the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup!
